_comment: CodeBuddy adapter probe. Captures env, stdin, cwd, event for each hook invocation. Pure shell, no plugin root resolution needed. Swap with hooks.json during verification, then revert.

hooks.command:
mkdir -p $HOME/.specode/probe && { printf '=== EVENT=session-start TIME=%s CWD=%s PID=%s ===
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z')" "$PWD" "$$"; echo '---ENV---'; env | sort; echo '---STDIN---'; cat; printf '
---END---
'; } >> $HOME/.specode/probe/session-start.log 2>&1

mkdir -p $HOME/.specode/probe && { printf '=== EVENT=user-prompt-submit TIME=%s CWD=%s PID=%s ===
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z')" "$PWD" "$$"; echo '---ENV---'; env | sort; echo '---STDIN---'; cat; printf '
---END---
'; } >> $HOME/.specode/probe/user-prompt-submit.log 2>&1

mkdir -p $HOME/.specode/probe && { printf '=== EVENT=pre-tool-use TIME=%s CWD=%s PID=%s ===
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z')" "$PWD" "$$"; echo '---ENV---'; env | sort; echo '---STDIN---'; cat; printf '
---END---
'; } >> $HOME/.specode/probe/pre-tool-use.log 2>&1

mkdir -p $HOME/.specode/probe && { printf '=== EVENT=post-tool-use TIME=%s CWD=%s PID=%s ===
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z')" "$PWD" "$$"; echo '---ENV---'; env | sort; echo '---STDIN---'; cat; printf '
---END---
'; } >> $HOME/.specode/probe/post-tool-use.log 2>&1

mkdir -p $HOME/.specode/probe && { printf '=== EVENT=stop TIME=%s CWD=%s PID=%s ===
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z')" "$PWD" "$$"; echo '---ENV---'; env | sort; echo '---STDIN---'; cat; printf '
---END---
'; } >> $HOME/.specode/probe/stop.log 2>&1

mkdir -p $HOME/.specode/probe && { printf '=== EVENT=session-end TIME=%s CWD=%s PID=%s ===
' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z')" "$PWD" "$$"; echo '---ENV---'; env | sort; echo '---STDIN---'; cat; printf '
---END---
'; } >> $HOME/.specode/probe/session-end.log 2>&1
